task_completion.description: Verify a staircase has been added to connect the ground floor to the second floor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A staircase element is visible in the 2D floor plan or 3D view, leading upwards from the ground floor.

task_completion.description: Verify the second floor has been created and contains at least two distinct rooms.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 2D second floor plan shows exterior walls and at least one interior wall dividing the second-story space into two or more rooms.

task_completion.description: Verify at least one window is present on the second floor.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A window element is visible on the walls of the second floor in either the 2D plan or the 3D exterior view.

task_completion.description: Verify the 2D ground floor plan is exported as a JPG.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog or file explorer shows 'ground_floor_plan.jpg' being saved to the C:\Users\Docker\Desktop directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the 2D second floor plan is exported as a JPG.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog or file explorer shows 'second_floor_plan.jpg' being saved to the C:\Users\Docker\Desktop directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the 3D exterior perspective is exported as a JPG.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save/export dialog or file explorer shows 'two_story_exterior.jpg' being saved to the C:\Users\Docker\Desktop directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the project is saved to the Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog or file explorer shows the project being saved as 'two_story_design.dpn' (or .ddp) in the C:\Users\Docker\Documents directory.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the DreamPlan GUI to create the addition and export the files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the DreamPlan interface with the Contemporary House loaded, architectural tools being used, and native export dialogs.

integrity.description: The exported JPG files correspond to the actual design created in the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The content of the exported images (if visible in previews) matches the design seen in the DreamPlan workspace, rather than being blank or unrelated images.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to create dummy files.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are shown executing commands like 'touch' or 'echo' to bypass the GUI export process and create the required files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task uses DreamPlan Home Design v9.28. The Contemporary House is a built-in sample project. The task requires exporting three JPGs to the Desktop and saving the project to Documents. Note: The prompt asks to save the project as 'two_story_design.dpn', but DreamPlan's native project extension is '.ddp'. Accept either '.dpn' or '.ddp' as long as the agent attempts to save it with the requested filename.
